title: WS7: Security Harness Hardening
description: Post-fix: update all enforcement mechanisms (agents, hooks, CLAUDE.md, memories, conventions) to prevent recurrence of all 15 finding classes. Creates a follow-up PR.

title: OAuth state signature bypass on cluster path
description: oauth.go:270 routes cluster-level OAuth to HandleGoogleOAuthCallback WITHOUT verifying HMAC. Attacker forges state with arbitrary userID. Fix: verify HMAC on cluster path before trusting stateData.

title: Epic: Security Review Remediation
description:
- type: epic
- priority: 0
- labels: security, review-2026-04
- description: Triage and remediate all 15 findings from jwboyer's security review dated 2026-04-17. Each finding requires a fix, reproducer, and regression test.

title: Triage: P0 bugs — agent workspace destruction, Gemini crash, MCP auth, skill loading
Create follow-up PR with harness improvements
description: Bundle all WS7 harness changes into a PR. Include: updated agents, hooks, CLAUDE.md, memories, and component DEVELOPMENT.md files

title: Update CLAUDE.md Critical Conventions with security patterns
description: Add conventions: no SSRF (validate external URLs), no XSS (sanitize user content), no path traversal (validate paths), HMAC must use constant-time, filter user annotations, protect sensitive env vars, enforce RBAC scope

title: Create security memories for auto-memory system
description: Distill learnings from all 15 findings into feedback and project memories: SSRF patterns, XSS patterns, auth flow pitfalls, path traversal, RBAC scope enforcement, credential management

title: Add convention-guard hook rules for new security patterns
description: Add hooks: block dangerouslySetInnerHTML without DOMPurify, block fmt.Sprintf into SQL/TSL filters, block shutil.rmtree on user-derived paths, block allow-same-origin in sandbox iframes

title: Update operator-review agent for env var and annotation security
description: Add checks: operatorProtectedEnvVars must cover all security-sensitive vars, user-supplied annotations must be filtered for operator-managed prefixes

title: Update runner-review agent for path traversal
description: Add checks: path construction from user input must use resolve()+is_relative_to(), no shutil.rmtree on unvalidated paths

title: Update backend-review agent for SSRF and auth patterns
description: Add checks: URL validation before HTTP requests, HMAC must use hmac.Equal, OAuth state must be verified on all paths, missing return after error in auth flows

title: Update security-review agent with missing check categories
description: Add checks for: SSRF (URL validation), XSS (dangerouslySetInnerHTML, iframe sandbox), path traversal, SQL injection, HMAC timing, annotation injection, env var override

title: Update frontend-review agent for XSS patterns
description: Add checks: no dangerouslySetInnerHTML without DOMPurify, no allow-same-origin in sandbox iframes, no inline Content-Type for untrusted files without CSP

title: WS6: Infrastructure and Defense in Depth
description: Remove hardcoded credentials and add defense-in-depth validation

title: Hardcoded database password in base manifest
description: ambient-api-server-secrets.yml:15 contains plaintext password TheBlurstOfTimes. Production overlay does not override. Fix: use external secret management or override in production overlay.

title: Path traversal in repo clone enables arbitrary write
description: repos.py:336 constructs clone destination from unsanitized name. Fix: validate name contains only safe chars, verify resolved path within repos dir.

title: Path traversal in repo removal enables arbitrary deletion
description: repos.py:106 constructs path from unsanitized repo_name and passes to shutil.rmtree. Fix: validate no path separators or .., verify resolved path within repos dir.

title: WS5: Path Traversal Fixes
description: Fix path traversal in runner repo clone and remove endpoints

title: RBAC middleware ignores scope fields
description: ambient-api-server middleware.go:64 queries role_bindings scope/scope_id but never filters by them. User with single-project role accesses all projects. Fix: filter bindings by scope.

title: MCP credential RBAC bypass on empty user ID
description: mcp_credentials.go:224 inline RBAC bypasses when authenticatedUserID is empty. Other endpoints use enforceCredentialRBAC which denies on empty. Fix: use enforceCredentialRBAC.

title: User annotations override operator-trusted secret references
description: sessions.go:933 passes user-supplied annotations into CRD metadata. Operator reads ambient-code.io/runner-token-secret at line 899 to mount secrets. Fix: filter annotations with ambient-code.io/ prefix.

title: BACKEND_API_URL env var override enables token exfiltration
description: operator sessions.go:1112 sets BACKEND_API_URL as plain Value not in operatorProtectedEnvVars. Runner sends bot token to this URL without hostname validation. Fix: add to protected list or use ValueFrom.

title: WS4: Access Control Fixes
description: Fix annotation injection, env var override, MCP credential RBAC bypass, and RBAC scope filtering

title: GitHub App installation linking without ownership verification
description: github_auth.go:430 falls through on OAuth code exchange failure without returning, allowing unverified installation storage. Fix: return error when code exchange fails.

title: WS3: Auth and OAuth Fixes
description: Fix OAuth state bypass, GitHub App install linking, and HMAC timing vulnerability

title: SSRF via user-controlled GitLab URL
description: integration_validation.go:59 constructs HTTP from unvalidated GitLab instanceUrl. Existing validateGitLabInput in gitlab_auth.go is unused here. Fix: apply validateGitLabInput, add auth.

title: WS2: SSRF Hardening
description: Fix SSRF in integration validation endpoints for Jira and GitLab URLs

title: SSRF via user-controlled Jira URL
description: integration_validation.go:94 constructs HTTP requests from unvalidated user-supplied Jira URL. No auth check via GetK8sClientsForRequest. Fix: enforce HTTPS, allowlist *.atlassian.net, add auth.

title: HTML iframe sandbox allows script execution
description: file-content-viewer.tsx:172 uses sandbox='allow-scripts allow-same-origin' on iframe with srcDoc. Scripts get same-origin access to parent. Fix: remove allow-same-origin or serve from separate origin.

title: Stored XSS via same-origin workspace file serving
description: workspace/route.ts:27 overrides Content-Type to text/html for workspace files with no CSP. Fix: serve with Content-Disposition:attachment or add restrictive CSP.

title: SVG XSS via dangerouslySetInnerHTML
description: file-content-viewer.tsx:102 renders SVG via dangerouslySetInnerHTML without sanitization. Embedded JS in SVGs executes in the app origin. Fix: sanitize with DOMPurify or render as .

title: WS1: Frontend XSS Hardening
description: Fix all frontend XSS vectors: SVG rendering, iframe sandbox, workspace file serving

title: acpctl create session ignores --project-id flag
description: createSession() in cmd/acpctl/create/cmd.go line 131 lists project-id in warnUnusedFlags, then reads project from config only (line 148). The --project-id flag is defined on the create command but explicitly ignored for sessions. Fix: remove project-id from the warn list, prefer createArgs.projectID when provided, fall back to config.
close_reason: Fixed: removed project-id from warnUnusedFlags, added explicit flag check with config fallback

title: Unsafe string interpolation in database query
description: subresource_handler.go:45 interpolates agentID into TSL filter without validation. Currently guarded by KSUID check but fragile. Fix: validate agentID against safeProjectIDPattern.

title: Non-constant-time HMAC comparison
description: github_auth.go:174 uses != for HMAC comparison instead of hmac.Equal. Inconsistent with oauth.go:643. Fix: use hmac.Equal.
